typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		SYS_MOD_COUNT as integer,
		SYS_ID as string,
		SYS_CREATED_ON as timestamp,
		PRODUCT_RELEASE_GUID as string,
		TASK_NUMBER as string,
		SYS_UPDATED_BY as string,
		PRODUCT_RELEASE_NUMBER as string,
		SYS_CREATED_BY as string,
		TASK_GUID as string,
		TODSH_BUSINESS_EFFECTIVE_DATE as date,
		SYS_UPDATED_ON as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> ReadPRODTASKRELATEDRELEASE
ReadPRODTASKRELATEDRELEASE sink(input(
		SYS_MOD_COUNT as integer,
		SYS_ID as string,
		SYS_CREATED_ON as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		PRODUCT_RELEASE_GUID as string,
		TASK_NUMBER as string,
		SYS_UPDATED_BY as string,
		PRODUCT_RELEASE_NUMBER as string,
		SYS_CREATED_BY as string,
		TASK_GUID as string,
		TODSH_BUSINESS_EFFECTIVE_DATE as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		SYS_UPDATED_ON as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		SYS_MOD_COUNT,
		SYS_ID,
		SYS_CREATED_ON,
		PRODUCT_RELEASE_GUID,
		TASK_NUMBER,
		SYS_UPDATED_BY,
		PRODUCT_RELEASE_NUMBER,
		SYS_CREATED_BY,
		TASK_GUID,
		TODSH_BUSINESS_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
		SYS_UPDATED_ON)) ~> WriteDEVTASKRELATEDRELEASE
